programme.title: Acts of Violence
programme.desc: (2018) Action-packed abduction thriller with Bruce Willis. When his fiancée is kidnapped by sex traffickers, a former US Army Ranger and his brothers join forces with a veteran detective to find her.

programme.title: Kentucky Rifle
programme.desc: (1955) Suspenseful western with Chill Wills, Lance Fuller and Cathy Downs. When a gun-filled wagon breaks down in enemy territory, will its occupants surrender their cargo or fight for their lives?

programme.title: Ride in The Whirlwind
programme.desc: (1966) Western starring Jack Nicholson. Mistaken for outlaws, three cowboys find themselves on the run from a relentless posse hungry for justice.

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: Flight attendant Heather Hale is shocked when her boyfriend asks her an important question, and a student attempts to get to New York to see his girlfriend. S1Ep10

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: The airline's customer service team face the challenge of getting passengers to Florida when the flight they are booked onto is oversold. S1Ep11

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: A daughter is embarrassed by her angry father, a grandmother is not allowed to travel with her oxygen canisters, and a delighted couple return home after adopting their baby daughter. S1Ep12

programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger.

programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger.

programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger.

programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger.

programme.title: Labor, Lies And Murder
programme.desc: (2022) Thriller with Brooke Burfitt. A pregnant woman hires a doula to help with her home birth. But as delivery day approaches and shocking secrets emerge, who can she really trust?

programme.title: Killer Ending
programme.desc: (2018) Drama thriller starring Chelsea Hobbs. Crime fiction becomes a horrifying reality when a novelist's daughter is abducted in a copycat scenario taken straight from her latest book.

programme.title: A Lover Betrayed
programme.desc: (2017) Thriller with Jamie Luner. Tess is finally ready to live again after her son's death years before. But a brief romance with a handsome soldier is about to twist from attraction into obsession..

programme.title: Amber Alert
programme.desc: A troubled young man hijacks a bus load of school children. Meanwhile Detective Amber Cross (Alaina Huffman), battling with her own demons and issues, is called in to negotiate

programme.title: My Baby Gone
programme.desc: A mother to be realises that the woman who moves in next door is not being truthful, and that once the baby is born it will be in danger. Starring Anna Van Hooft (2017)

programme.title: Girlfriend Killer
programme.desc: A businesswoman who creates the perfect marriage proposals for wealthy men, becomes the target of a crazy client's obsession. Starring Barbie Castro (2017)

programme.title: Framed By My Sister
programme.desc: (2021) Deadly drama with Scout Taylor-Compton. A pair of adopted twins are surprised to meet their triplet who was separated from them at birth, but three's a crowd - especially when one's a killer.

programme.title: Master Gardener
programme.desc: (2022) Thriller with Joel Edgerton and Sigourney Weaver. A horticulturist's ordered life is thrown into chaos when he takes on an apprentice. As dark secrets surface, rules are about to be broken...

programme.title: Shadow Wolves
programme.desc: (2019) Edge-of-your-seat thriller starring Thomas Gibson. A rogue NSA agent joins an elite group of Native American trackers to stop terrorists crossing the US border. Also starring Louise Lombard.

programme.title: Sniper Elite
programme.desc: A squad of elite human soldiers faces down a powerful and deadly extraterrestrial army. Starring Kevin Sorbo (2014)
